title: lindernia rotundifolia
intro: Lindernia rotundifolia, also known as round-leaf false-linden, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Linderniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lindernia rotundifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Lindernia rotundifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
